musicStyles.label: House
musicStyles.description: Warm 4x4 instrumental groove — steady tri-wave pulse, moderate dynamics.

musicStyles.label: Melodic House
musicStyles.description: Broader melodic instrumental phrasing with restrained peak energy.

musicStyles.label: Progressive House
musicStyles.description: Long-build instrumental arrangements with spacious transitions.

musicStyles.label: EDM
musicStyles.description: Festival-oriented instrumental prior — punchy square waves, wide stereo impact.

musicStyles.label: Techno
musicStyles.description: Driving instrumental warehouse prior — dense percussive transients, high gain.

musicStyles.label: Trance
musicStyles.description: Euphoric instrumental prior — sine-swept pads, fast momentum.

musicStyles.label: Tropical House
musicStyles.description: Chill-out sun-drenched instrumental — pluck-led maritime house melodies, turquoise and coral vibes.

musicStyles.label: Classical
musicStyles.description: Orchestral instrumental palette — long sine phrases, gentle dynamics, wide harmonic spacing.

musicStyles.label: Jazz
musicStyles.description: Instrumental jazz palette — variable swing feel, subtle dynamics, tritone accents.
